ar.msg.summary: SwitchBot BLE scan completed: {count} device(s) found in {elapsed_ms} ms.
ar.msg.no_devices: No SwitchBot BLE devices were found.
ar.tool.description: Discover nearby SwitchBot BLE devices and return a JSON or text list.
ar.param.interface.description: Optional local BLE adapter/interface name to bind to.
ar.param.retry.description: How many BLE scan rounds to run before returning.
ar.param.limit.description: Maximum number of devices to return. 0 means unlimited.
ar.err.invalid_numeric: Timeout, retry, and limit must be integers.
ar.err.invalid_range: Timeout and retry must be greater than 0; limit must be 0 or greater.
ar.err.bleak_missing:
Error: 'bleak' library is not installed. Please install it using:
pip install bleak
ar.err.linux_permission:
Error during BLE operation: {err_msg}

[Linux/Raspberry Pi Permission Guide]
You might lack permissions to access the Bluetooth socket. Try one of the following:
1. Add your user to the bluetooth group (recommended):
   sudo usermod -aG bluetooth $USER
   (Requires restart or re-login)
2. Grant permissions directly to the Python binary:
   sudo setcap 'cap_net_raw,cap_net_admin+eip' $(readlink -f $(which python))
ar.err.macos_permission:
Error during BLE operation: {err_msg}

[macOS Permission Guide]
Bluetooth access might have been denied by macOS security restrictions.
Please open 'System Settings > Privacy & Security > Bluetooth' and ensure your terminal, VS Code, or Python process is allowed to access Bluetooth.

el.msg.summary: Ολοκληρώθηκε η σάρωση SwitchBot BLE: Βρέθηκαν {count} συσκευές σε {elapsed_ms} ms.
el.tool.description: Ανακαλύψτε κοντινές συσκευές SwitchBot BLE και επιστρέψτε μια λίστα JSON ή κειμένου.
el.param.interface.description: Προαιρετικό τοπικό όνομα προσαρμογέα/διασύνδεσης BLE για σύνδεση.
el.param.timeout.description: Λήξη χρονικού ορίου σάρωσης σε δευτερόλεπτα.
el.param.retry.description: Πόσοι γύροι σάρωσης BLE πρέπει να εκτελέσετε πριν επιστρέψετε.
el.param.limit.description: Μέγιστος αριθμός συσκευών προς επιστροφή. Το 0 σημαίνει απεριόριστο.
el.err.invalid_numeric: Το χρονικό όριο, η επανάληψη και το όριο πρέπει να είναι ακέραιοι.
el.err.invalid_range: Το χρονικό όριο λήξης και η επανάληψη πρέπει να είναι μεγαλύτερα από 0. το όριο πρέπει να είναι 0 ή μεγαλύτερο.
el.err.bleak_missing:
Σφάλμα: Η βιβλιοθήκη 'blaak' δεν έχει εγκατασταθεί. Εγκαταστήστε το χρησιμοποιώντας:
pip install bleak
el.err.linux_permission:
Σφάλμα κατά τη λειτουργία BLE: {err_msg}

[Οδηγός άδειας Linux/Raspberry Pi]
Ενδέχεται να μην έχετε δικαιώματα πρόσβασης στην υποδοχή Bluetooth. Δοκιμάστε ένα από τα παρακάτω:
1. Προσθέστε τον χρήστη σας στην ομάδα bluetooth (συνιστάται):
   sudo usermod -aG bluetooth $USER
   (Απαιτεί επανεκκίνηση ή επανασύνδεση)
2. Εκχωρήστε δικαιώματα απευθείας στο δυαδικό αρχείο Python:
   sudo setcap 'cap_net_raw,cap_net_admin+eip' $(readlink -f $(which python))
el.err.macos_permission:
Σφάλμα κατά τη λειτουργία BLE: {err_msg}

[Οδηγός άδειας macOS]
Η πρόσβαση Bluetooth ενδέχεται να έχει απορριφθεί από περιορισμούς ασφαλείας του macOS.
Ανοίξτε τις «Ρυθμίσεις συστήματος > Απόρρητο και ασφάλεια > Bluetooth» και βεβαιωθείτε ότι το τερματικό σας, ο Κωδικός VS ή η διαδικασία Python επιτρέπεται να έχει πρόσβαση στο Bluetooth.

he.msg.summary: סריקת SwitchBot BLE הושלמה: {count} מכשירים נמצאו ב-{elapsed_ms} אלפיות השנייה.
he.tool.description: גלה מכשירי SwitchBot BLE בקרבת מקום והחזר JSON או רשימת טקסט.
he.param.interface.description: שם מתאם/ממשק BLE מקומי אופציונלי לאיגד.
he.param.retry.description: כמה סבבי סריקת BLE לרוץ לפני החזרה.
he.param.limit.description: המספר המרבי של מכשירים להחזרה. 0 פירושו בלתי מוגבל.
he.param.service_uuid.description: מסנן UUID של שירות GATT אופציונלי.
he.err.invalid_numeric: פסק זמן, ניסיון חוזר והגבלה חייבים להיות מספרים שלמים.
he.err.invalid_range: הזמן הקצוב והניסיון החוזר חייבים להיות גדולים מ-0; הגבול חייב להיות 0 או יותר.
he.err.bleak_missing:
שגיאה: ספריית 'עגומה' אינה מותקנת. נא להתקין אותו באמצעות:
pip install beak
he.err.linux_permission:
שגיאה במהלך פעולת BLE: {err_msg}

[מדריך הרשאות לינוקס/Raspberry Pi]
ייתכן שחסרות לך הרשאות לגשת לשקע ה-Bluetooth. נסה אחת מהאפשרויות הבאות:
1. הוסף את המשתמש שלך לקבוצת ה-Bluetooth (מומלץ):
   sudo usermod -aG bluetooth $USER
   (דורש הפעלה מחדש או התחברות מחדש)
2. הענק הרשאות ישירות לקובץ הבינארי של Python:
   sudo setcap 'cap_net_raw,cap_net_admin+eip' $(readlink -f $(which python))
he.err.macos_permission:
שגיאה במהלך פעולת BLE: {err_msg}

[מדריך הרשאות macOS]
ייתכן שהגישה ל-Bluetooth נדחתה על ידי הגבלות האבטחה של macOS.
פתח את 'הגדרות מערכת > פרטיות ואבטחה > Bluetooth' וודא שהטרמינל, קוד VS או תהליך Python שלך רשאים לגשת ל-Bluetooth.

hu.msg.summary: A SwitchBot BLE vizsgálat befejeződött: {count} eszköz található {elapsed_ms} ms alatt.
hu.tool.description: Fedezze fel a közeli SwitchBot BLE-eszközöket, és küldjön vissza JSON- vagy szöveges listát.
hu.param.retry.description: Hány BLE vizsgálati kört kell lefutnia a visszatérés előtt.
hu.param.limit.description: A visszaküldhető eszközök maximális száma. A 0 azt jelenti, hogy korlátlan.
hu.err.invalid_numeric: Az időtúllépés, az újrapróbálkozás és a korlát csak egész szám lehet.
hu.err.invalid_range: Az időtúllépésnek és az újrapróbálkozásnak nagyobbnak kell lennie, mint 0; korlátnak 0-nak vagy nagyobbnak kell lennie.
hu.err.bleak_missing:
Hiba: a 'sivár' könyvtár nincs telepítve. Kérjük, telepítse a következő használatával:
pip install bleak
hu.err.linux_permission:
Hiba a BLE művelet során: {err_msg}

[Linux/Raspberry Pi engedélyezési útmutató]
Előfordulhat, hogy nincs engedélye a Bluetooth aljzat eléréséhez. Próbálkozzon az alábbiak egyikével:
1. Adja hozzá felhasználóját a Bluetooth csoporthoz (ajánlott):
   sudo usermod -aG bluetooth $USER
   (Újraindítást vagy újrajelentkezést igényel)
2. Adjon engedélyt közvetlenül a Python binárisnak:
   sudo setcap 'cap_net_raw,cap_net_admin+eip' $(readlink -f $(mely python))
hu.err.macos_permission:
Hiba a BLE művelet közben: {err_msg}

[macOS engedélyek útmutató]
A Bluetooth-hozzáférést megtagadhatták a macOS biztonsági korlátozások.
Nyissa meg a „Rendszerbeállítások > Adatvédelem és biztonság > Bluetooth” menüpontot, és győződjön meg arról, hogy terminálja, VS-kódja vagy Python-folyamata hozzáfér a Bluetooth-hoz.

ro.param.fmt.description: Inspectați sau ștergeți memoria cache ECHONET Lite partajată.
ro.msg.summary: Scanare BLE SwitchBot finalizată: {count} dispozitiv(e) găsit(e) în {elapsed_ms} ms.
ro.msg.no_devices: Nu au fost găsite dispozitive SwitchBot BLE.
ro.tool.description: Descoperiți dispozitivele SwitchBot BLE din apropiere și returnați o listă JSON sau text.
ro.param.interface.description: Numele adaptorului/interfeței BLE local opțional la care să se leagă.
ro.param.retry.description: Câte runde de scanare BLE trebuie să rulați înainte de a vă întoarce.
ro.param.limit.description: Numărul maxim de dispozitive de returnat. 0 înseamnă nelimitat.
ro.param.service_uuid.description: Filtru UUID pentru serviciul GATT opțional.
ro.err.invalid_numeric: Timeout, reîncercare și limita trebuie să fie numere întregi.
ro.err.invalid_range: Timeout și reîncercare trebuie să fie mai mare decât 0; limita trebuie să fie 0 sau mai mare.
ro.err.bleak_missing:
Eroare: biblioteca 'bliak' nu este instalată. Instalați-l folosind:
pip install bleak
ro.err.linux_permission:
Eroare în timpul operației BLE: {err_msg}

[Ghid de permisiuni Linux/Raspberry Pi]
Este posibil să nu aveți permisiuni pentru a accesa priza Bluetooth. Încercați una dintre următoarele:
1. Adăugați utilizatorul dvs. în grupul bluetooth (recomandat):
   sudo usermod -aG bluetooth $USER
   (Necesită repornire sau reconectare)
2. Acordați permisiuni direct binarului Python:
   sudo setcap 'cap_net_raw,cap_net_admin+eip' $(readlink -f $(which python))
ro.err.macos_permission:
Eroare în timpul operației BLE: {err_msg}

[Ghid de permisiuni macOS]
Este posibil ca accesul Bluetooth să fi fost refuzat de restricțiile de securitate macOS.
Deschideți „Setări de sistem > Confidențialitate și securitate > Bluetooth” și asigurați-vă că terminalul, codul VS sau procesul Python au permisiunea de a accesa Bluetooth.

nb.msg.summary: SwitchBot BLE scan completed: {count} device(s) found in {elapsed_ms} ms.
nb.msg.no_devices: No SwitchBot BLE devices were found.
nb.tool.description: Discover nearby SwitchBot BLE devices and return a JSON or text list.
nb.param.interface.description: Optional local BLE adapter/interface name to bind to.
nb.param.retry.description: How many BLE scan rounds to run before returning.
nb.param.limit.description: Maximum number of devices to return. 0 means unlimited.
nb.err.invalid_numeric: Timeout, retry, and limit must be integers.
nb.err.invalid_range: Timeout and retry must be greater than 0; limit must be 0 or greater.
nb.err.bleak_missing:
Error: 'bleak' library is not installed. Please install it using:
pip install bleak
nb.err.linux_permission:
Error during BLE operation: {err_msg}

[Linux/Raspberry Pi Permission Guide]
You might lack permissions to access the Bluetooth socket. Try one of the following:
1. Add your user to the bluetooth group (recommended):
   sudo usermod -aG bluetooth $USER
   (Requires restart or re-login)
2. Grant permissions directly to the Python binary:
   sudo setcap 'cap_net_raw,cap_net_admin+eip' $(readlink -f $(which python))
nb.err.macos_permission:
Error during BLE operation: {err_msg}

[macOS Permission Guide]
Bluetooth access might have been denied by macOS security restrictions.
Please open 'System Settings > Privacy & Security > Bluetooth' and ensure your terminal, VS Code, or Python process is allowed to access Bluetooth.

pip install bleak
zh_TW.err.linux_permission:
Error during BLE operation: {err_msg}

[Linux/Raspberry Pi Permission Guide]
You might lack permissions to access the Bluetooth socket. Try one of the following:
1. Add your user to the bluetooth group (recommended):
   sudo usermod -aG bluetooth $USER
   (Requires restart or re-login)
2. Grant permissions directly to the Python binary:
   sudo setcap 'cap_net_raw,cap_net_admin+eip' $(readlink -f $(which python))
zh_TW.err.macos_permission:
Error during BLE operation: {err_msg}

[macOS Permission Guide]
Bluetooth access might have been denied by macOS security restrictions.
Please open 'System Settings > Privacy & Security > Bluetooth' and ensure your terminal, VS Code, or Python process is allowed to access Bluetooth.
